topic: Vitamin D deficiency: 7 symptoms doctors often miss
caption:
⚠️ 1 IN 3 ADULTS has a silent Vitamin D deficiency, and doctors often miss the signs! This 'sunshine vitamin' is actually a crucial hormone, governing everything from your immune system to your mood. ☀️ But its symptoms are so vague, they're frequently mistaken for stress, fatigue, or even depression. Don't let your health silently drain away. We're breaking down the 7 sneaky symptoms that often go undiagnosed, so you can advocate for your health. A simple blood test can reveal the truth and lead to profound improvements in your well-being. 💪

💾 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you.
